key.name: backend
key.summary: Active AI backend

key.name: api-endpoint
key.summary: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint

key.name: api-key
key.summary: API key for local / cloud OpenAI-compatible API

key.name: local-model
key.summary: Model name for local API

key.name: local-api-enabled
key.summary: Whether the Local API backend is enabled
key.description: Set to false to hide the Local API from the backend list.

key.name: online-api-endpoint
key.summary: Cloud OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (e.g. OpenRouter)

key.name: online-api-key
key.summary: API key for the online API endpoint

key.name: online-api-model
key.summary: Model name for the online API

key.name: gemini-model
key.summary: Gemini model for CLI calls. Accepts full IDs or CLI aliases: auto, pro, flash, flash-lite.

key.name: gemini-cli-path
key.summary: Path or command name for the Gemini CLI binary

key.name: claude-model
key.summary: Claude model for CLI calls. Accepts full IDs or CLI aliases: opus, sonnet, haiku, best.

key.name: claude-cli-path
key.summary: Path or command name for the Claude CLI binary

key.name: copilot-model
key.summary: Copilot model for CLI calls

key.name: copilot-cli-path
key.summary: Path or command name for the Copilot CLI binary

key.name: codex-model
key.summary: Codex model for CLI calls (e.g. gpt-5.4, gpt-5.4-mini, gpt-5.3-codex)

key.name: codex-cli-path
key.summary: Path or command name for the OpenAI Codex CLI binary

key.name: codex-api-key
key.summary: CODEX_API_KEY for OpenAI Codex CLI (leave empty to use OAuth login or CODEX_API_KEY from session env)

key.name: opencode-model
key.summary: OpenCode model for CLI calls

key.name: opencode-cli-path
key.summary: Path or command name for the OpenCode CLI binary

key.name: auto-paste
key.summary: Automatically paste result into the active window

key.name: auto-action-enabled
key.summary: Automatically trigger an action when copying new text

key.name: auto-action-id
key.summary: ID of the action to automatically trigger

key.name: show-notifications
key.summary: Show GNOME notifications for start / done / error events

key.name: auto-check-quota
key.summary: Periodically check API quota in the background
key.description: If enabled, ping the API every 5 minutes to update the quota percentage in the tray menu.

key.name: auto-start-lms
key.summary: Automatically start LM Studio
key.description: If enabled, automatically attempt to start the LM Studio server if a local AI connection fails.

key.name: history-size
key.summary: Number of past transformations to keep in history

key.name: position-area
key.summary: Panel area for the indicator
key.description: Where to place the tray indicator: 'left', 'center', or 'right'.

key.name: position-index
key.summary: Position index within the panel area
key.description: Lower numbers are further left/top within the chosen area, higher numbers are further right/bottom.

key.name: actions-json
key.summary: JSON array of action objects
key.description: Each action: {id, name, prompt, hotkey, enabled, backend}. Defaults are seeded programmatically from DEFAULT_ACTIONS in prefs.js on first open.
